response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse experience in architecture and team leadership, but lacks demonstrated German proficiency (only 'Basic'), has no explicit evidence of UML or formal IT architecture leadership, and his work history is primarily in Brazil with no clear track record in German IT consulting or client advisory roles.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across multiple languages and domains (DLang, Node, TypeScript, etc.)
Strong mentorship and workshop experience in testing, TDD, and dev practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — below required C1 level
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or client advisory experience
Work history lacks direct exposure to German IT consulting market or compliance/security frameworks
